These can dramatically affect your marketing success, but how do you even determine those challenges and successes are for future events? It all begins with measuring your events\u2019 performance using the right key performance indicators (KPIs). These metrics keep you on track and show you what is and isn\u2019t working. For example, if you\u2019re only measuring total revenue or ticket sales, you don\u2019t have clear visibility into your marketing performance. If your analysis stops there, you\u2019re missing out on an opportunity to grow your audience, boost your event\u2019s return on investment (ROI), and hit key event goals. Get ahead of your competition and learn how to improve your event with this definitive list of event marketing KPIs. ##### **14 KPIs to monitor before and after your event** [KPIs to monitor before your event](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#before) [1. Sales by ticket type](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#one) [2. Sales by marketing source](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#two) [3. Attendee geography](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#three) [4. Website conversion rate](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#four) [5. Email marketing engagement rates](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#five) [KPIs to check when wrapping up your event](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#after) [6. Attendance](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#six) [7. Total profit](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#seven) [8. New vs. returning attendees](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#eight) [9. Top attendees by money spent](https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/#nine)\n...\nTitle: 14 Event Marketing KPIs for Measuring Your Success URL Source: https://www.eventbrite.com/blog/measure-event-success-kpis/ Published Time: 2024-03-22T08:00:00-05:00 Markdown Content: The number one issue that event organizers cite is [internal event management problems](https://www.convene-digital.org/convene/november_2022/MobilePagedReplica.action?pm=2&folio=42#pg46).
